title: Fix Time Zone & Global Control popups: reposition left, restore local time and font size controls

requirements.summary: Reposition the Time Zone button popup to open on the left-hand side, anchored close to the Time Zone button
acceptanceCriteria: The Time Zone popup renders to the left of (or left-aligned near) the Time Zone button.
The popup does not overlap unrelated UI elements or extend off-screen.
No other popups or UI elements are repositioned.

file_operations.description: Modify the Time Zone button's Popover component positioning. Update the PopoverContent to use left-side alignment (e.g., 'align="end"' and 'side="left"' or similar shadcn/ui Popover props) so the popup appears anchored to the left of the Time Zone button instead of its current position. Ensure the popup remains within viewport bounds.

requirements.summary: Reposition the Global Control button popup to open on the left-hand side, anchored close to the Global Control button
acceptanceCriteria: The Global Control popup renders to the left of (or left-aligned near) the Global Control button.
The popup does not overlap unrelated UI elements or extend off-screen.
No other popups or UI elements are repositioned.

file_operations.description: Modify the Global Control button's Popover component positioning. Update the PopoverContent to use left-side alignment (e.g., 'align="end"' and 'side="left"' or similar shadcn/ui Popover props) so the popup appears anchored to the left of the Global Control button instead of its current position. Ensure the popup remains within viewport bounds.

requirements.summary: Restore the Local Time display inside the Time Zone button's popup box with UTC offset
acceptanceCriteria: The Time Zone popup contains a visible local time display with the current time and UTC offset.
The local time updates correctly based on the selected or detected timezone.
No other content in the Time Zone popup is removed or rearranged.

file_operations.description: Add Local Time display back into the Time Zone popup content. Inside the Time Zone PopoverContent, add a section that displays the current local time with UTC offset (e.g., '14:32:15 (UTC+1)'). Use existing state variables (currentLocalTime, currentTimezoneOffset) or create new ones if needed. Ensure the time updates dynamically (using useEffect with setInterval or similar) and formats the UTC offset correctly (including fractional offsets like +5.75). Position this display prominently within the popup, above or below existing timezone controls.

requirements.summary: Re-add the Font Size control to the Global Control popup, placed directly below the Globe Rotation control
acceptanceCriteria: The Global Control popup contains a Font Size control rendered immediately below the Globe Rotation control.
Adjusting the Font Size control changes the relevant font size in the UI as it did previously.
Globe Rotation control remains functional and is unaffected by this change.

file_operations.description: Add Font Size control back into the Global Control popup content. Inside the Global Control PopoverContent, locate the Globe Rotation control section and add a Font Size slider or input immediately below it. Wire the control to the cityFontSize state variable and ensure it calls the appropriate update function (likely related to WebsiteLayoutSettings or a local state handler). Use a Slider component with appropriate min/max values (e.g., 8-24 for font size in pixels) and display the current value. Ensure the control updates the font size of city labels on the map or globe in real-time.
